## What changed?

Describe the change in plain language.

## Why is it better?

What need does it solve, or what makes it more fun, original, visual, or interactive?

## Visitor experience

What can a visitor now see or do?

## Testing completed

- [ ] `node --check app.js`
- [ ] `node --check scripts/forge.mjs`
- [ ] `node --check scripts/validate.mjs`
- [ ] `node scripts/validate.mjs`
- [ ] Tested through a local web server
- [ ] Tested on a narrow/mobile viewport
- [ ] Tested with keyboard controls where relevant
- [ ] Tested pointer or touch controls where relevant

## Visual evidence

Add screenshots or a short recording for interface, motion, animation, or game changes.

## Safety check

- [ ] No secret, token, personal data, tracker, or analytics code was added
- [ ] No hidden or unnecessary external network request was added
- [ ] Feedback or other user-provided text is treated as untrusted input
- [ ] Workflow, deployment, or validation changes are clearly identified

## Known limitations

List anything that should be handled in a later change.
